sqlMap.select: select * from TaxSuppLW where VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
sqlMap.insert: insert into TaxSuppLW(VersionSequence, PolicyKey IsApplDesignedTaxShelter IsIRSChallenged LastUpdateUserID LastUpdateTimeStamp IsApplInvInPrivMemo PlacementMemoDetails IsApplSubjOfFedState ) values (#VersionSequence:NUMERIC#, #PolicyKey:NUMERIC# #IsApplDesignedTaxShelter# #IsIRSChallenged# #LastUpdateUserID# #LastUpdateTimeStamp# #IsApplInvInPrivMemo# #PlacementMemoDetails# #IsApplSubjOfFedState# )
sqlMap.select: select IsApplDesignedTaxShelter, IsIRSChallenged, LastUpdateUserID, LastUpdateTimeStamp, IsApplInvInPrivMemo, PlacementMemoDetails, IsApplSubjOfFedState, VersionSequence, PolicyKey from TaxSuppLW where VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
sqlMap.update:
update TaxSuppLW set
IsApplDesignedTaxShelter = #IsApplDesignedTaxShelter# IsApplDesignedTaxShelter = null IsIRSChallenged = #IsIRSChallenged# IsIRSChallenged = null LastUpdateUserID = #LastUpdateUserID# LastUpdateUserID = null LastUpdateTimeStamp = #LastUpdateTimeStamp# LastUpdateTimeStamp = null IsApplInvInPrivMemo = #IsApplInvInPrivMemo# IsApplInvInPrivMemo = null PlacementMemoDetails = #PlacementMemoDetails# PlacementMemoDetails = null IsApplSubjOfFedState = #IsApplSubjOfFedState# IsApplSubjOfFedState = null
where VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
sqlMap.delete: delete from TaxSuppLW where VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
delete from TaxSuppLW where VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
sqlMap.select: select IsApplDesignedTaxShelter, IsIRSChallenged, LastUpdateUserID, LastUpdateTimeStamp, IsApplInvInPrivMemo, PlacementMemoDetails, IsApplSubjOfFedState, VersionSequence, PolicyKey from TaxSuppLW where VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#

select VersionSequence, PolicyKey, IsApplDesignedTaxShelter, IsIRSChallenged, LastUpdateUserID, LastUpdateTimeStamp, IsApplInvInPrivMemo, PlacementMemoDetails, IsApplSubjOfFedState from TaxSuppLW where VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
